title: Clinical and genomic findings in brain heterotopia: Report of a pediatric patient cohort from Romania.
author: Budisteanu M Papuc SM Erbescu A Iliescu C Dobre M Barca D Tarta-Arsene O Motoescu C Dica A Sandu C Anghelescu C Craiu D Arghir A
content: S-EPMC8674960 PMC8674960 Clinical and genomic findings in brain heterotopia: Report of a pediatric patient cohort from Romania.
